text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The Tracen Meet kicks off in a few days.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Hey, did you hear? Pretty much everyone dropped out of Group 10
for the 2000-meter turf race after they heard about Brian entering.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
Right, right! That group is full of G1 racers now. I'm so glad I got out
in time...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Hmm... So that's what's goin' on.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Huh? Why d'you ask?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Don't tell me you're gonna ask me to drop out too.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Whatever the other racers do is none of my business. I'm no chicken!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Sure, Brian is one hell of a runner. Calling her G1-class doesn't even
cut it.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Plus, tons of folks are gonna be watchin' the race. I know the other
runners don't wanna damage their reputation right outta the gate.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: But I'm not givin' up.
choice_data_list: Because giving up is lame, right?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Heh, that's right. I'm glad ya get me.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Cool racers like me don't back down from a challenge!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, ya ready, Trainer? The event'll be here before ya know it, so
we better get workin'!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: We focus all our efforts into training for the next few days.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Finally, the day of the Tracen Meet arrives.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Yeaaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Listen to the crowd going wild! Only one racer can create such a
reaction—the G1 star of Group 10...

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: The fearsome beast—Narita Brian!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: How noisy.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Damn... Talk about havin' a presence.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Getting cold feet all of a sudden? It's okay if you want to chicken
out—I can put in a word with the committee.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Wha?! As if! Don't you dare!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna win. Just watch me!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Yeah, yeah, I'm all eyes... Geez.

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
That's... an ambitious statement. Does Vodka actually think she can
beat Narita Brian?

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer A
text_block_list.text: Vodka's got potential... but nowhere near that level...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The race officially kicks off.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Bang!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
(I can do this! If I win against Brian... That'd make me so cool the
track'd freeze over!)

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Let's go!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Vodka has made her move! She's smoothly accelerating and making
her way up the group!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The race started off at a quick pace, and I can see Vodka is doing her
best to keep up.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: But as they approach the final stretch...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: (Crap... My vision... is getting blurry...)

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Damn it!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Game's over.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Narita Brian makes her move! Look at that speed! She's cutting
through the pack and establishing her lead!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Daaaaamn it!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Vodka's accelerating again, but the gap is already tremendous! Narita
Brian has put five—no, six lengths between her and second place!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: (I can't do it... She's too fast!)

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Impossible... There's no way...

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Narita Brian finishes in first! What an amazing show of power! What a
beautiful run we all just witnessed!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Unfortunately, Vodka finishes in fifth place.

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
Vodka put up a good fight... but it was reckless of her to take on such
a challenge.

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. If only she picked a different group, she would've easily been
the star of the show.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Whoa there! What're ya lookin' so scary for, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: It's fine. There was nothing I could do about it.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: I'm just... lame as hell...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before I can even give her a word of encouragement, Vodka turns on
her heel and walks away.
